About.name: David Maksić
About.p1: I'm a self-taught developer, whose skills were built through years of learning and thousands of hours of practical work.
About.p2: Across multiple projects, I've tackled real-world challenges: server-side rendering, authentication, state management (Redux and Context API), and third-party integrations. I work with React, React Query/Router, Next.js and JavaScript daily; for styling, I utilize Tailwind and CSS. I'm currently expanding into Node.js/Express, Vue.js, and PostgreSQL.
About.p3: Over the past three years, I consistently studied programming by using documentations, blogs, coding challenges, tutorials, courses and AI models.
